data.title: Refactor bridge-outbound.py::process_outbound (629 lines) into event handler functions
data.description: Extract 7 event handlers (_handle_create_event, _handle_status_event, etc.) from process_outbound(). Reduce main function to ~50-line dispatcher. Each handler <100 lines. AC: process_outbound <80 lines, no function >150 lines, all tests pass.
